risks.risk: Pending GST demand of ~Rs 120 cr under appeal before the CESTAT; an adverse ruling would dent FY27 cash flows. (Source: https://www.bseindia.com/xml-data/corpfiling/AttachHis/navin-gst.pdf)
ICRA flagged the debt-funded cGMP-4 capex peak as a monitorable in its latest rationale. (Source: https://www.icra.in/Rationale/ShowRationaleReport?Id=98231)

thesis.point: CDMO mix shift structurally lifts blended EBITDA margins toward the mid-20s as high-value molecules ramp.
thesis.falsifier: Blended EBITDA margin stays below 22% through FY27 despite cGMP-4 ramping.

thesis.point: cGMP-4 commissioning roughly doubles high-value capacity, underwriting multi-year revenue growth.
thesis.falsifier: cGMP-4 utilisation stalls below 50% two years after commissioning.

thesis.point: The R32 headwind is cyclical and laps by H2 FY27, restoring the refrigerants contribution.
thesis.falsifier: R32 realisations remain depressed into FY28 with no volume offset.

thesis.point: Marquee innovator relationships create high switching costs and durable pricing power.

anti_thesis.point: Net debt peaks on the capex cycle; a demand air-pocket would strain the balance sheet.
anti_thesis.falsifier: Net debt / EBITDA exceeds 3x at any point in FY27.

anti_thesis.point: Chinese oversupply in fluorochemicals could extend pricing pressure beyond refrigerants.
anti_thesis.falsifier: Specialty-chemicals gross margin compresses more than 300 bps YoY in FY27.

anti_thesis.point: Execution risk on the cGMP-4 ramp given the historical lumpiness of CDMO revenue.
anti_thesis.falsifier: cGMP-4 commercial supply slips beyond H1 FY28.
